rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Boot Configuration Database (BCD) Manipulation - Registry Modification

rules.rule_text:
title: Boot Configuration Database (BCD) Manipulation - Registry Modification
id: 99a9fbb6-62bf-4cb7-8406-a363bc14cbf3
status: experimental
description: Detects registry modifications occuring in tandem with disruption of
  boot processes with bcdedit (or as a method to evade detection)
references:
- https://www.cisa.gov/uscert/ncas/alerts/aa22-321a
- https://blog.nviso.eu/2022/05/30/detecting-bcd-changes-to-inhibit-system-recovery/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/22
tags:
- attack.impact
- attack.t1490
- attack.g0092
logsource:
  category: registry_set
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_1:
    EventType: SetValue
    TargetObject|contains: elements
  selection_2:
    TargetObject|contains:
    - '16000009'
    - 250000e0
  condition: selection_1 and selection_2
falsepositives:
- WMI initiating BCD changes
level: high
